Package neqsim.pvtsimulation.flowassurance

Class HydrateRiskMapper.RiskPoint

java.lang.Object
neqsim.pvtsimulation.flowassurance.HydrateRiskMapper.RiskPoint
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
HydrateRiskMapper
public static class HydrateRiskMapper.RiskPoint extends Object implements Serializable
Risk assessment at a single pipeline point.

  • Constructor Details

    • RiskPoint

      RiskPoint(double distanceKm, double pressureBara, double actualTemperatureC, double hydrateTemperatureC, double subcoolingC, HydrateRiskMapper.RiskLevel riskLevel)
      Creates a risk point.
      Parameters:
      distanceKm - distance from inlet
      pressureBara - pressure
      actualTemperatureC - actual temperature
      hydrateTemperatureC - hydrate formation temperature
      subcoolingC - subcooling margin
      riskLevel - risk classification
